items.title: Mixed trip-type choice discovery
items.name: Mixed trip-type choice discovery
items.summary: Discovery will test how riders interpret price, wait, and certainty tradeoffs across standard, shared, and scheduled rides.
items.opportunity: Clarify whether clearer packaging can improve conversion without weakening trust in pricing.

linkedInitiatives.description: Planned investment to make tradeoffs across trip products more legible.

plannedActivities: Review rider confusion in mixed product-choice markets
Prototype alternative pricing and certainty explanations
items.decisionToMake: Choose the clearest trip-type packaging model for Q3.
